programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact Or Fiction
programme.desc: (M) Tormented by childhood memories of abduction, a woman discovers an implant in her body. A sailor captures lights over the Pacific Ocean that he believes are alien craft, and a couple finds unusual footprints in the woods.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact Or Fiction
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact Or Fiction
programme.desc: (M) A musician captures a strange object flying over a highway in California. A tourist takes what could be the most compelling UFO photo ever, and two friends fear they were abducted on a road trip.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact Or Fiction
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.
